```sparql
PREFIX ecrm: <http://erlangen-crm.org/current/>
SELECT ?performance WHERE { ?performance ecrm:P7_took_place_at <http://www.geonames.org/11185639/abbaye-royale-du-parc-aux-dames.html> }
```
